features: 🍓 Delightful Wild Berry Scent – Infuse your home with a sweet and fruity wild berry fragrance that lingers.
💨 Quick-Dry Spray Formula – Dries instantly without leaving wet residues, safe for fabrics and the air.
🏡 Perfect for Any Space – Ideal for use in living rooms, bedrooms, offices, bathrooms, and more.
🌿 Eliminates Unwanted Odors – Neutralizes bad smells, replacing them with a refreshing and inviting aroma.
📦 Value Pack of 3 (750ml Total) – Get more freshness with this convenient multipack, ensuring long-lasting use.
description: Product description Transform your space with the Pan Aroma Wild Berries Air Freshener Dry Spray. Designed for instant freshness, this air freshener releases a delightful wild berry scent, creating a welcoming atmosphere in your home or office. The dry formula ensures no damp residue, making it safe for spraying on fabrics and in the air. With this pack of 3 (750ml total), you get long-lasting freshness at great value. Whether you need to eliminate odors in the bathroom, bedroom, or living area, Pan Aroma provides a quick and effective solution. Simply spray and enjoy an instant fragrance boost! ✨ Refresh your home with a burst of fruity freshness! ✨ Ingredients Spray
